codeReview.summary: The change set addresses the scrutiny request by adding explicit Branch B CLI-launch reliability scope, codified skill-assignment ownership rules, and a documented handoff evidence requirement tying followedProcedure=true to validator evidence coverage. One clarity gap remains in branch-specific procedure wording.

issues.description: Work Procedure steps 3 and 5 still prescribe daemon-runtime-specific checks (run lifecycle/reconciliation, duplicate terminal/takeover semantics) even when Branch B is selected; this can mislead CLI-launch-reliability features that do not touch those runtime semantics.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Branch B now requires `swift test --package-path OpenBurnBarCore --filter CLILaunchInvokerTests`, but `.factory/services.yaml` does not expose a dedicated command alias for this surface despite mission guidance saying to use services.yaml as the command source of truth.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/runtime-orchestration-worker/SKILL.md:44 introduces CLILaunchInvokerTests command; mission AGENTS.md:29 says to use `.factory/services.yaml`; `.factory/services.yaml` has `test_core_contracts` and broad `test` but no CLILaunchInvoker-specific command.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The updated skill adds a branch-mismatch return rule, but this reviewed run still marked followedProcedure=true without branch-specific validator evidence, indicating procedural enforcement is documentation-only (not currently machine-gated).
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/skills/runtime-orchestration-worker/SKILL.md:119 says branch mismatches should return to orchestrator; handoff file `.../handoffs/2026-04-21T00-23-21-350Z__misc-runtime-skill-scope-alignment__15e2dea2-86a3-48d0-ae9d-6094e342e3d8.json` records `followedProcedure: true` with commandsRun containing only rg + BurnBarMissionControlContractsTests.

summary: Reviewed feature misc-runtime-skill-scope-alignment for milestone misc-quality-hardening-04. Diff and transcript skeleton were reviewed; implementation meets the requested alignment/evidence-guidance goals overall, with one non-blocking branch-procedure clarity issue and two shared-state observations recorded.
